info.name: Modal Web Endpoints (Representative)
info.description: REPRESENTATIVE collection - NOT a first-party Modal REST API. Modal's primary interface is the Python/JS/Go SDK and the `modal` CLI over gRPC. The only genuine HTTPS surface is user-deployed web endpoints on *.modal.run, whose routes and schemas are defined by the developer's own code. These requests illustrate the shape of a typical deployed endpoint.

item.name: Web Endpoints
item.description: User-deployed HTTPS endpoints on *.modal.run. Representative shapes only.

request.description: Representative GET handler for a function decorated with @modal.fastapi_endpoint(). Query parameters and response are defined by the developer's own code. Not a Modal-owned endpoint.
Representative POST handler for @modal.fastapi_endpoint(method="POST") or an ASGI/WSGI app. Request/response bodies are defined by the developer's own code. Not a Modal-owned endpoint.
For @modal.asgi_app / @modal.wsgi_app / @modal.web_server, the mounted app defines its own routes under the same *.modal.run host. Representative only.

item.name: Sandboxes
item.description: Sandbox lifecycle is SDK/gRPC-only; only a tunneled port is HTTP.

request.description: A running Sandbox can expose a container port over an HTTPS network tunnel. Sandbox create/exec/terminate is SDK/gRPC-only; only the tunneled port is HTTP, and its shape is user-defined. Representative only.
